texto: Reality in movies is the reality of the story you're telling, so it may not match the reality as we know it, but the reason there's art is that it tries to bring some kind of understanding of all the suffering and joys and pain that we go through. Storytelling brings some value to it.
explicacao: Citação de Caleb Deschanel sobre temas ligados a familia. “Reality in movies is the reality of the story you're telling, so it may not match the reality as …” articula familia, art, pain em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como pain e value.
